features.name: interface with localparam declaration
features.description: Code should include an interface definition containing a localparam declaration

features.name: dotted access to interface localparam
features.description: Code should include dotted access to an interface localparam from module scope

features.name: interface parameter vs localparam dotted access
features.description: Code should include both parameter and localparam with same dotted access pattern to demonstrate inconsistency
